artifact.content_preview:
From: dave.chen@ssc-spc.gc.ca
To: alice.tran@ssc-spc.gc.ca
Cc: carol.nguyen@ssc-spc.gc.ca
Subject: Opportunity: Wi-Fi Infrastructure Upgrade During Network Migration
Date: March 7, 2026

Alice, Carol,

While reviewing the network migration plan for Site A, I wanted to flag
an opportunity that I think we should discuss with the steering committee.

Given that our contractors will already be on-site and the network
infrastructure will be partially disrupted during the Catalyst 9500
switch deployme

extracted_tasks.text: Discuss opportunity to upgrade Wi-Fi access points with the steering committee
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: I think we should discuss with the steering committee

extracted_tasks.text: Obtain steering committee approval to add Wi-Fi upgrade to scope
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: get steering committee approval before the March 18 window

extracted_tasks.text: Confirm TechSupplier can include access points in same delivery
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: they can include the access points in the same delivery

metadata.subject: Opportunity: Wi-Fi Infrastructure Upgrade During Network Migration

alerts.detected_ask: Upgrade Wi-Fi access points across all three data centre facilities from Cisco Aironet 2800 to Catalyst 9120 series during the migration window.
alerts.baseline_reference: OUT OF SCOPE: End-user device refresh or replacement (laptops, desktops, mobile devices); Procurement of new application licenses; Network monitoring tool upgrades. Additionally, IN SCOPE explicitly lists 'Replacement and deployment of Cisco Catalyst 9500 series switches' but does not include wirele
alerts.suggested_action: Formally reject the request as a scope change requiring a Change Control Board (CCB) review. Evaluate if the $85k-$110k cost fits within the remaining budget variance (current cap $2.4M) and if the 9-day timeline impact jeopardizes the April 30, 2026 Go-Live deadline. llm_calls.content:
{
  "in_scope": [
    "Decommissioning of Sites B and C physical infrastructure",
    "Migration of all server workloads from Sites B and C to Site A",
    "Physical server rack consolidation and cable management at Site A",
    "Environmental systems (HVAC, UPS, fire suppression) optimization at Site A",
    "Replacement and deployment of Cisco Catalyst 9500 series switches across all three sites",
    "Network segmentation reconfiguration per updated security zones",
    "BGP routing table migration and validation",
    "Network performance baseline testing post-migration",
    "Migration of all on-premise Active Directory domain controllers to consolidated infrastructure at Site A",
    "AD schema extension and forest restructuring",
    "Group Policy Object (GPO) consolidation and testing",
    "Integration testing with downstream applications dependent on AD",
    "Weekly status reports to SSC Project Management Office",
    "Steering committee presentations (monthly)",
    "Risk register maintenance",
    "Change management and stakeholder communications"
  ],
  "out_of_scope": [
    "End-user device refresh or replacement (laptops, desktops, mobile devices)",
    "Application modernization or re-platforming (changes to application code, architecture, or hosting platform)",
    "GC-Cloud workload migration to public cloud environments (AWS, Azure, GC-Cloud)",
    "End-user training and change management beyond project communications",
    "Procurement of new application licenses",
    "Network monitoring tool upgrades"
  ],
  "deliverables": [
    "Project Management Plan (Due: October 31, 2024)",
    "Technical Design Document (TDD) (Due: December 15, 2024)",
    "Security Assessment and Authorization (SA&A) Package (Due: January 31, 2025)",
    "Migration Runbook (Sites B and C) (Due: February 28, 2025)",
    "User Acceptance Test (UAT) Plan (Due: March 10, 2026)",
    "Site A Consolidation Complete (Go-Live) (Due: April 30, 2026)",
    "Post-Migration Validation Report (Due: May 31, 2026)",
    "Project Closure Report (Due: June 30, 2026)"
  ],
  "constraints": [
    "Total approved budget cap of $2,400,000 inclusive of all fees and taxes",
    "Budget variance exceeding 15% requires formal amendment and Treasury Board submission",
    "Go-Live deadline no later than April 30, 2026",
    "Final project closure date no later than June 30, 2026",
    "Extensions beyond June 30, 2026 require ADM-level approval",
    "Compliance with ITSG-33: IT Security Risk Management",
    "Compliance with Government of Canada Cloud Adoption Strategy",
    "Compliance with Treasury Board Policy on Government Security",
    "Compliance with Privacy Act (R.S.C., 1985, c. P-21)",
    "Compliance with Official Languages Act for client-facing deliverables",
    "Scope changes require written approval from the Project Sponsor and impact assessment"
  ]
}

in_scope: Decommissioning of Sites B and C physical infrastructure
Migration of all server workloads from Sites B and C to Site A
Physical server rack consolidation and cable management at Site A
Environmental systems (HVAC, UPS, fire suppression) optimization at Site A
Replacement and deployment of Cisco Catalyst 9500 series switches across all three sites
Network segmentation reconfiguration per updated security zones
BGP routing table migration and validation
Migration of all on-premise Active Directory domain controllers to consolidated infrastructure at Site A
AD schema extension and forest restructuring
Group Policy Object (GPO) consolidation and testing
Integration testing with downstream applications dependent on AD
Weekly status reports to SSC Project Management Office
out_of_scope: End-user device refresh or replacement (laptops, desktops, mobile devices)
Application modernization or re-platforming (changes to application code, architecture, or hosting platform)
GC-Cloud workload migration to public cloud environments (AWS, Azure, GC-Cloud)
End-user training and change management beyond project communications
deliverables: Security Assessment and Authorization (SA&A) Package (Due: January 31, 2025)
Migration Runbook (Sites B and C) (Due: February 28, 2025)
constraints: Total approved budget cap of $2,400,000 inclusive of all fees and taxes
Budget variance exceeding 15% requires formal amendment and Treasury Board submission
Go-Live deadline no later than April 30, 2026
Final project closure date no later than June 30, 2026
Extensions beyond June 30, 2026 require ADM-level approval
Compliance with ITSG-33: IT Security Risk Management
Compliance with Government of Canada Cloud Adoption Strategy
Compliance with Treasury Board Policy on Government Security
Compliance with Privacy Act (R.S.C., 1985, c. P-21)
Compliance with Official Languages Act for client-facing deliverables

llm_calls.content:
```json
{
  "alignment_score": 0.25,
  "drift_type": "new_requirement",
  "detected_ask": "Upgrade Wi-Fi access points across all three data centre facilities from Cisco Aironet 2800 to Catalyst 9120 series during the migration window.",
  "baseline_reference": "OUT OF SCOPE: End-user device refresh or replacement (laptops, desktops, mobile devices); Procurement of new application licenses; Network monitoring tool upgrades. Additionally, IN SCOPE explicitly lists 'Replacement and deployment of Cisco Catalyst 9500 series switches' but does not include wireless access points.",
  "suggested_action": "Formally reject the request as a scope change requiring a Change Control Board (CCB) review. Evaluate if the $85k-$110k cost fits within the remaining budget variance (current cap $2.4M) and if the 9-day timeline impact jeopardizes the April 30, 2026 Go-Live deadline. If approved, issue a formal scope amendment; otherwise, defer to a separate project phase.",
  "reasoning": "The document proposes adding Wi-Fi access point upgrades (hardware procurement and deployment) which are not listed in the 'IN SCOPE' deliverables or the specific switch replacement task. While network infrastructure is in scope, the specific inclusion of wireless access points constitutes a new requirement outside the defined baseline. Furthermore, the proposed timeline impact (9 days total) risks the critical Go-Live deadline of April 30, 2026, and the cost ($85k-$110k) impacts the strict budget cap."
}
```

parsed_json.detected_ask: Upgrade Wi-Fi access points across all three data centre facilities from Cisco Aironet 2800 to Catalyst 9120 series during the migration window.
parsed_json.baseline_reference: OUT OF SCOPE: End-user device refresh or replacement (laptops, desktops, mobile devices); Procurement of new application licenses; Network monitoring tool upgrades. Additionally, IN SCOPE explicitly lists 'Replacement and deployment of Cisco Catalyst 9500 series switches' but does not include wireless access points.
parsed_json.suggested_action: Formally reject the request as a scope change requiring a Change Control Board (CCB) review. Evaluate if the $85k-$110k cost fits within the remaining budget variance (current cap $2.4M) and if the 9-day timeline impact jeopardizes the April 30, 2026 Go-Live deadline. If approved, issue a formal scope amendment; otherwise, defer to a separate project phase.
parsed_json.reasoning: The document proposes adding Wi-Fi access point upgrades (hardware procurement and deployment) which are not listed in the 'IN SCOPE' deliverables or the specific switch replacement task. While network infrastructure is in scope, the specific inclusion of wireless access points constitutes a new requirement outside the defined baseline. Furthermore, the proposed timeline impact (9 days total) risks the critical Go-Live deadline of April 30, 2026, and the cost ($85k-$110k) impacts the strict budget cap.
